publishedAbstract: The `ocs-metrics-exporter` deployment is not receiving the required Multus network attachment annotation. The `ocs-metrics-exporter` deployment is not receiving the required Multus network attachment annotation, while the ceph-tools deployment already has this handled correctly. As a temporary validation step, the ocs-operator was scaled down and the ocs-metrics-exporter deployment was manually patched with the required Multus network annotation. This confirmed that the missing annotation is related to the issue. However, this change is not persistent, as it will be reverted once the operator is scaled back up. A permanent fix is needed in the ocs-operator source so that the storagecluster/exporter controller applies the Multus network attachment in the same way the storagecluster/cephtoolbox controller already does. ~~~ $ oc project openshift-storage $ oc scale deployment/ocs-operator--replicas 0 $ oc patch deployment/ocs-metrics-exporter--patch '{"spec": {"template": {"metadata": {"annotations": {"k8s.v1.cni.cncf.io/networks": " "}}}}}' ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF:  The "ocs-metrics-exporter" deployment is not receiving the required Multus network attachment annotation.
